overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi horror game showing a character exploring a dimly lit industrial facility. The character ascends metal stairwells, explores an upper catwalk surrounding a large circular containment structure with crystalline growth, collects a device, and interacts with a wall terminal.

events.description: character exits dark stairwell into area with teal ambient lighting and yellow safety railings

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs in a dimly lit industrial facility, moving toward upper level

entered.detail: vertical metal staircase with open grating steps and industrial railings
red warning lights illuminating the lower stairwell area
exposed pipes and conduits running along the wall
bright yellow guard rails marking the edge of the upper platform
cool blue-green atmospheric lighting illuminating the upper level
elevated metal walkway with industrial grating floor
large cylindrical structure with glass walls containing an organic mass

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a dark industrial stairwell with red emergency lighting, transitioning to an upper catwalk area illuminated by teal ambient light. The circular containment structure becomes visible in the distance as the character reaches the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper observation platform surrounding containment structure

events.description: character approaches console and picks up a PROSPECTOR device

agents.ego_description: walking along the circular platform, examining the containment structure and collecting equipment from a console

entered.detail: organic purple crystalline mass with bioluminescent properties inside the containment tank
metal workstation with glowing buttons and screens
large crates and equipment boxes stacked along the railing

segments.scene_description: The character explores the upper catwalk surrounding the large circular containment structure, which houses a glowing crystalline growth. The character approaches an equipment console and collects a device, while moving past industrial storage containers and yellow safety railings.

events.description: character begins descending metal stairs to lower level

agents.ego_description: completing a circuit around the platform and descending stairs back to the lower level near the containment structure

entered.detail: illuminated sign with TERRA logo visible through the glass
second metal staircase leading downward to the lower floor
ground floor walkway with red accent lighting
doorway with intense red lighting emanating from within

segments.scene_description: The character continues around the platform, passing corporate signage and storage containers, then descends a second stairwell to the lower level. The red-lit doorway becomes visible as the character approaches the ground floor corridor.

events.description: character interacts with FORT SOLIS wall terminal to transfer map data

agents.ego_description: using wrist datapad and accessing a wall-mounted terminal to download facility map data

entered.detail: wall-mounted interactive display showing FORT SOLIS facility map interface
glowing holographic display showing facility layout and system menus
progress bar interface showing data transfer to wrist device

segments.scene_description: The character accesses a wrist datapad and approaches the FORT SOLIS wall terminal. The holographic interface displays facility maps and system data as the character initiates a data transfer to their device.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial facility, transitioning from a claustrophobic stairwell to an expansive containment platform and back down to a technical terminal. It begins with the character ascending a dark stairwell bathed in red emergency lighting, which gradually gives way to a teal-lit upper catwalk as a massive circular containment structure comes into view. As the camera moves along the platform, it passes yellow safety railings and industrial containers toward a glowing crystalline growth, where the character pauses to collect a device from an equipment console. The scene then shifts as the character continues past corporate signage and descends a second stairwell, returning to the red-lit atmosphere of the ground floor corridor. Finally, the movement concludes at a wall terminal, where the camera focuses on a holographic interface displaying facility maps and system data during a data transfer.
